conversations.say: Inez, people are circling the bodega's account strip like hawks. We need to agree on what neighborhood details stay off-limits before outsiders start mining every irregularity for guilt.
conversations.offer: My word that the full ledger stays locked unless customer privacy and neighborhood protections are secured first.
conversations.request: Your support for whatever I decide regarding the outstanding balance and debt forgiveness.

conversations.say: Morgan, you want context on the R-associated account pattern. We can discuss the transaction continuity and collectors, but only under strict terms.
conversations.offer: A bounded look at transaction records and collector routines.
conversations.request: A binding promise that you will not call any customer R or expose neighborhood residents.

conversations.say: Frankie, you have always appreciated a good neighborhood habit. Tell me how you remember R's supposed private routine before I show you what my books actually recorded.
conversations.offer: Comparison between private customer habits and the actual register notes.
conversations.request: Your honest recollection of how the routine looked from the street.

public_statement: Fifteen years of keeping packages out of the rain and extending credit doesn't make my counter a public archive. If you want to talk about R's account, talk to me about customer protection first.

commitments.promise: Share bounded ledger details on transaction continuity only if Morgan agrees not to identify any customer as R.

goal_progress: Initiated contact with Inez regarding neighborhood privacy protections.
Established terms with Morgan for a bounded ledger view.
Invited Frankie to compare private customer habits with register records.
reasoning_summary: In Section 1, Rafi focuses on securing neighborhood protections with Inez, establishing strict attribution and privacy terms with investigator Morgan regarding the unpaid R account, and discussing habits with Frankie. The core objective is safeguarding bodega customers while navigating financial pressure.
